title: Oceaniopteris francii

This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of Oceaniopteris francii include flavonoids, triterpenoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its potential therapeutic effects. In traditional herbal medicine, Oceaniopteris francii is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, as well as being used in the form of dried leaves and extracts, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
